overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage featuring the protagonist Basim walking through a sunlit historic Middle Eastern city. The character traverses a covered canal-side walkway, ascends stone stairs to an elevated terrace, pauses to observe the scenic water view, and continues through a decorative archway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under green fabric canopy beside calm water

entered.detail: large green cloth covering overhead providing shade
decorative wooden partition with geometric pattern
colorful rolled rugs and bedding stacked along the path
calm waterway running parallel to the walkway
tall beige brick wall with climbing vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded covered walkway beside a canal. Green fabric canopy overhead filters the sunlight, while rolled carpets and flowering bushes line the left side. A tall stone wall runs along the right.

events.description: exits shaded canopy into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along open path toward stone staircase ahead

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward to terrace level
tall palm trees visible against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into direct sunlight, the character approaches a wide stone staircase. Palm trees rise in the background against a clear sky as the path continues toward the ascending steps.

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while moving toward terrace level

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress descending stairs, passes the character at the top

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade with geometric cutout patterns
flat stone flooring at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the stone staircase flanked by decorative lattice railings. Near the top, a woman in dark clothing descends past the character. The canal falls out of view as the terrace level approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlooking canal and city

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters open terrace area
stops at railing to observe the scenic view

agents.ego_description: standing at terrace railing looking out over water and distant cityscape

entered.detail: decorative patterned carpet laid on terrace floor
large palm tree in decorative planter
historic stone buildings with domes and arches across the water
simple wooden seating along the railing

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the terrace, the character stops at the decorative railing to overlook the canal and distant city. The view reveals historic Islamic architecture across the water, palm trees, and an ornate carpet on the terrace floor. The camera pans to take in the scenic vista.

events.description: turns from railing and resumes walking toward archway
passes through decorative stone archway into shaded corridor

agents.ego_description: walking across terrace toward and through the arched stone doorway

entered.detail: ornate Islamic arch with carved stone details and metal gate
low wooden table with pottery items displayed
terracotta pots with green plants near the arch

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the viewpoint and walks across the terrace toward a decorative stone archway. Passing a wooden display table with pottery, the character moves through the arch into a shaded corridor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded canal-side passage up to an elevated terrace overlooking a historic city. It begins with the character walking along a covered walkway where green fabric canopies filter the sunlight and flowering bushes line the path. As the character emerges from the shade into direct sunlight, the camera follows them toward a wide stone staircase flanked by decorative lattice railings. Upon reaching the top, the scene expands into a scenic vista as the character pauses at a railing to overlook the canal and distant Islamic architecture under a clear sky. The movement finally continues across the ornate terrace floor, passing a table of pottery before moving through a decorative stone archway into a shaded corridor.
